_comment: Claude plugin manifest. Read by Claude Code / Cowork when the plugin is installed; it points the client at the bundled MCP server (.mcp.json at the repo root) and the skills/ directory. Keep the version here in sync with SERVER_VERSION in server/digits_server.py and the version in .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.
name: digits
description: Digits — connect Claude to Apple Numbers. Zero-dependency MCP tools to read and edit live Numbers spreadsheets (cells, formulas, rows, columns, sheets, CSV/PDF/Excel export) via AppleScript, plus budget-review, monthly-report, and data-cleanup skills.
